# OncoGuide — Cancer Patient Information

OncoGuide provides free, evidence-based, actionable cancer information for patients
and their families. Content is non-commercial and informational only.

## Topics covered
- Cancer diagnosis: step-by-step guides, genetic testing, imaging
- Treatment access: patient rights, medication reimbursement, legal options
- International oncology centers: objective comparisons, patient reviews
- Clinical trials: how to find and access relevant studies
- Patient guides per cancer type: NSCLC, breast, melanoma, colorectal, prostate

## Languages
English, Romanian, Italian, French, German, Spanish

## Important notes
- All content is informational only, not medical advice
- Content is written by patients for patients
- No commercial affiliations or advertising
- Author is anonymous

## Technical
- Sitemap: https://oncoguide.github.io/sitemap.xml
- RSS: https://oncoguide.github.io/index.xml
